cross_crypto_slow_diffusion.screen_gate: train>=80, val>=20, OOS>=40; all post-cost edges >2.5bp per event (0.00025 return units); OOS hit-rate >=50%; split edge ratio <=5x

funding_taker_flow.screen_gate: train and validation post-cost positive; OOS must also have enough events and positive post-cost edge before full backtest

selection_contract.rejected_backtest_policy: save rejected hypothesis and reason; do not threshold-mine in full backtest
